module simd_load8_lane.0.wasm
assert_return v128.load8_lane_0 i32:0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_1 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010000000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_2 i32:2 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000200000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_3 i32:3 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000003000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_4 i32:4 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000040000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_5 i32:5 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000500000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_6 i32:6 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000006000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_7 i32:7 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000070000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_8 i32:8 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000800000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_9 i32:9 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000009000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_10 i32:10 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:000000000000000000000a0000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_11 i32:11 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000b00000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_12 i32:12 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:0000000000000000000000000c000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_13 i32:13 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:000000000000000000000000000d0000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_14 i32:14 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000e00
assert_return v128.load8_lane_15 i32:15 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:0000000000000000000000000000000f
assert_return v128.load8_lane_0_offset_0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_1_offset_1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010000000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_2_offset_2 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000200000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_3_offset_3 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000003000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_4_offset_4 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000040000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_5_offset_5 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000500000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_6_offset_6 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000006000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_7_offset_7 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000070000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_8_offset_8 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000800000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_9_offset_9 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000009000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_10_offset_10 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:000000000000000000000a0000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_11_offset_11 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000b00000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_12_offset_12 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:0000000000000000000000000c000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_13_offset_13 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:000000000000000000000000000d0000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_14_offset_14 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000e00
assert_return v128.load8_lane_15_offset_15 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:0000000000000000000000000000000f
assert_return v128.load8_lane_0_align_1 i32:0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_1_align_1 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010000000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_2_align_1 i32:2 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000200000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_3_align_1 i32:3 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000003000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_4_align_1 i32:4 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000040000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_5_align_1 i32:5 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000500000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_6_align_1 i32:6 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000006000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_7_align_1 i32:7 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000070000000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_8_align_1 i32:8 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000800000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_9_align_1 i32:9 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000009000000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_10_align_1 i32:10 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:000000000000000000000a0000000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_11_align_1 i32:11 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000b00000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_12_align_1 i32:12 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:0000000000000000000000000c000000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_13_align_1 i32:13 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:000000000000000000000000000d0000
assert_return v128.load8_lane_14_align_1 i32:14 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000e00
assert_return v128.load8_lane_15_align_1 i32:15 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:0000000000000000000000000000000f
assert_invalid simd_load8_lane.1.wasm
assert_invalid simd_load8_lane.2.wasm
assert_invalid simd_load8_lane.3.wasm
